Calculate Expected Actuarial Present Value

calc_apv.acdf.Rd

Computes the Expected Actuarial Present Value (APV) of future cash flows given a survival model (acdf or alife object).

Usage

# S3 method for class 'acdf'
calc_apv(
  x,
  payment,
  residual_value,
  elapsed_time,
  max_lifetime,
  max_delay,
  payment_cap,
  discount_factors,
  delay_prob_matrix,
  depreciation_matrix,
  ...
)

Arguments

x

An object of class acdf or alife.

payment

Monthly payment amount.

residual_value

Contractual residual value.

elapsed_time

Current age (time elapsed) of the lease.

max_lifetime

Maximum time to consider (time horizon).

max_delay

Maximum possible payment delay.

payment_cap

Cap on the number of payments to be made.

discount_factors

Numeric vector of monthly discount factors.

delay_prob_matrix

Matrix where rows are termination times and columns are delay lengths.

depreciation_matrix

Matrix with rows as termination times, first column is expectation and second column is variance of depreciation.

...

Additional arguments.

On this page
